query:
SELECT id, status, theme, accountId, mcpPending, createdAt 
FROM posts 
WHERE DATE(createdAt) >= '2026-06-06'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3F5sJN7FajWtXbb.root --database 3LYkMyiPgdB2gzxf44Hk3M --execute
